request.prompt: A graphite matte stand mixer with a polished stainless mixing bowl sits centered on a white marble countertop in a luxury kitchen at dawn. Cool blue light pours through tall windows from the right, catching a faint warm rim on the mixer's curved body. Slow gentle dolly push-in, low static angle. Vertical 9:16 framing. 35mm cinematic, soft directional light, dust motes drifting in the beam, deep velvet shadows. A24-flavored color grade, restrained, hushed, reverent. No text, no logos.
